metadata.methodology: Decent Homes Standard requires properties to: meet the current statutory minimum for housing (HHSRS); be in reasonable repair; have reasonably modern facilities; provide reasonable degree of thermal comfort. English Housing Survey (EHS) is a continuous survey of households and the condition of housing in England. Damp and mould prevalence from EHS interviewer assessment.
knownIssues: English Housing Survey relies on interviewer assessment of damp/mould — may undercount self-reported cases
Decent Homes Standard has not been updated since 2006 — may not reflect modern standards for digital connectivity, ventilation, etc.
Private rented sector is harder to survey — some estimates put non-decent homes higher at 25-27%
